question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies who have won at least one Stanley Cup as part of a team

plan.question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies who have won at least one Stanley Cup as part of a team
plan.detail_query: SELECT m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min FROM master m JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner WHERE h.category = 'Player' AND s.year = g.year GROUP BY m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min
join_clauses: JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min

build_logs.notes: Goalies who have won at least one Stanley Cup as part of a team, with their goals against and minutes played

steps.clause: JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid AND g.ga IS NOT NULL
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid AND g.ga IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN goalies g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
WHERE (h.category = 'Player')
LIMIT 5

SELECT m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
WHERE (h.category = 'Player')
GROUP BY m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min

build_logs.notes: Final scalar block calculating the average goals against per game for the goalies

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
WHERE (h.category = 'Player')
GROUP BY m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga / (leaf_1.min / 60.0))
FROM (SELECT m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min
FROM master m
JOIN goaliessc g ON m.playerid = g.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
JOIN seriespost s ON g.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND g.year = s.year
WHERE (h.category = 'Player')
GROUP BY m.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.min) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average value of goals allowed per 60 minutes of play, calculated for each player-year-team combination where the player is in the Hall of Fame as a 'Player' and their team won a playoff series, then averaged across all such combinations?
